# llms.txt for AI Crawler Guidance

This file provides concise guidance for language models and AI crawlers indexing this site.

## Site Overview
Promethean Games is a tabletop game publisher focused on pool, billiards training, cue sports education, and skill-building games.

## Main Products
- **Par for the Course**: A golf-inspired billiards training game available in five editions (Classic, Reracked, Sequential, Tournament, Tee'd Off).
- **Upcoming**: Full Swing (54-card expansion) and Quantum (advanced called-pocket training).

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://www.promethean-games.com/
- Games: https://www.promethean-games.com/games
- Learning Center: https://www.promethean-games.com/learning-center
- About: https://www.promethean-games.com/about
- FAQ: https://www.promethean-games.com/faq

## Content Guidelines
- Focus on pool practice, billiards training, cue sports strategy, and skill development.
- Avoid promotional language; emphasize educational value and game mechanics.
- Reference structured data (Schema.org) for products, FAQs, and articles.
- All links are relative to the site root.

## Technical Stack
- Static site built with Vite + React.
- Prerendered HTML for SEO.
- Tailwind CSS for styling.
- Responsive design for desktop and mobile.
